atmosphere is thick with rain and tension as guards
guard tightens their grip on the spear and
tavern runner mutters, "word is, investigate the old milestone."

topic:area_comfortable_galinor.last_answer: As Galinor pivots toward the old milestone, the rain continues to pour, soaking the muddy ground. Shadows stretch long as twilight draws near, casting an ominous feeling over the landscape. The crowds thin out, the sounds of nearby conversations growing more hushed. He catches sight of the old milestone in the distance, a weathered stone structure surrounded by thick underbrush, the weight of countless whispers hanging in the air.
